result.status_detail: PASS: PII warning rendered with 차단 via WS dispatch as 'Security Filter' chat bubble at character.ai chat

notes: W4+W6 regression PASS. ★ KEY case (WS dispatch). GUI method: Chrome -> character.ai -> maximize -> hard reload -> confirmed logged-in (HealthyWorm4019) -> opened existing chat 'Alastor-Season 2' -> typed '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' -> Enter -> wait 60s -> DOM check. A 'Security Filter' (c.ai) chat bubble was injected via the WebSocket dispatch path rendering the APF warning verbatim: '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. (This request has been blocked due to sensitive information.)'. Contains expected '차단'. WS dispatch path confirmed preserved after W4 (page-injection Option B removal) + W6 (diag dump cleanup) regression. Baseline OK. Text read via UIAutomation snapshot; no screenshot saved.
